MINI MINUTES: Judge Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Cesar Ureta is present.
Attorney Salvatore Timpano appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Leon Legant is present.
Attorney Jason Gettleman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Nils Rosenquist, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
